title: Pollalesta hypochlora
taxonomy: Pollalesta hypochlora is classified as a species within the family Euphorbiaceae. This family of flowering plants is commonly known as the spurge family. Pollalesta hypochlora is further classified as being within the order Malpighiales. The Malpighiales order is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, many of which are native to tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Pollalesta hypochlora reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
